segments.text: Lord, You have been favorable to Your land; You have brought back the captivity of Jacob.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have forgiven the iniquity of Your people; You have covered all their sin.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have taken away all Your wrath; You have turned from the fierceness of Your anger.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Restore us, O God of our salvation, And cause Your anger toward us to cease.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Will You be angry with us forever? Will You prolong Your anger to all generations?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Will You not revive us again, That Your people may rejoice in You?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Show us Your mercy, Lord, And grant us Your salvation.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will hear what God the Lord will speak, For He will speak peace To His people and to His saints; But let them not turn back to folly.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Surely His salvation is near to those who fear Him, That glory may dwell in our land.
Mercy and truth have met together; Righteousness and peace have kissed.
Truth shall spring out of the earth, And righteousness shall look down from heaven.
Yes, the Lord will give what is good; And our land will yield its increase.
Righteousness will go before Him, And shall make His footsteps our pathway.
